small.name: Institute of Contemporary Art
small.notes: Diller Scofidio + Renfro; cantilevered gallery over harbor; compact urban museum

medium.name: Broad Museum
medium.notes: Diller Scofidio + Renfro; contemporary art; veil-and-vault concept; 50,000 SF gallery

large.name: Metropolitan Museum of Art (Modern Wing)
large.notes: Full-campus museum; encyclopedic collection; extensive BOH and conservation

space_library.name: Grand Lobby / Atrium
notes: Ticketing; coat check; orientation; often multi-story atrium; acoustics critical for events

space_library.name: Ticketing / Admissions
notes: Queue management; POS system; membership desk

space_library.name: Gallery / Exhibition Space
notes: Climate control critical: 70F +/-2, 50% RH +/-5%; UV filtering; 12-20 ft ceiling; floor load 100+ PSF for sculpture; flexible partition systems

space_library.name: Temporary / Rotating Exhibition Gallery
notes: Flexible lighting grid; high floor load; large freight access for installation; blackout capability

space_library.name: Theater / Auditorium
notes: 18 SF/seat orchestra; fly tower 2.5x proscenium height; orchestra pit; isolation from structure-borne noise; Noise Criteria NC-20 to NC-25

space_library.name: Backstage / Stagehouse
notes: Wing space; crossover; scene shop access; dressing room access; trap room below stage

space_library.name: Dressing Rooms / Green Room
notes: Star dressing room 200 SF; chorus 15 SF/person; sinks, mirrors, costume racks

space_library.name: Lighting / Sound Control Booth
notes: Clear sightline to stage; glazed opening; isolated from audience noise

space_library.name: Scene Shop / Workshop
notes: Woodworking, metalworking, paint; dust collection; 20 ft clear height; freight door to stage

space_library.name: Art Handling / Crating Room
notes: Climate controlled; oversized freight elevator access; soft flooring; museum-grade security

space_library.name: Art Storage / Collection Vault
notes: Climate controlled 70F, 50% RH; compact shelving; fire suppression (dry pipe or gas); no water pipes above; card access

space_library.name: Conservation Lab
notes: North-facing daylight preferred; fume hoods; imaging equipment; acid-free storage

space_library.name: Education / Classroom
notes: Art-making activities; sink; flexible furniture; separate from galleries for noise

space_library.name: Museum Shop / Gift Store
notes: Near exit path; visible from lobby; accessible without admission in some models

space_library.name: Cafe / Restaurant
notes: Often accessible without admission; outdoor seating desirable; grease trap

space_library.name: Event / Rental Space
notes: Catering kitchen access; views; independent access for after-hours events; divisible

space_library.name: Coat Check / Bag Storage
notes: Near lobby; secure; bag size restrictions for security

space_library.name: Administrative Offices
notes: Curatorial, development, marketing, director; conference room included

space_library.name: Security Office / Command Center
notes: CCTV monitoring; alarm systems; sightline to lobby; near art handling

space_library.name: Loading / Receiving
notes: Climate-controlled dock for art; 14 ft clear; dock leveler; air lock vestibule; high security

space_library.name: Public Restrooms
notes: IBC Assembly fixture counts; family restroom; distribute near lobby and galleries

space_library.name: Main Mechanical
notes: Museum-grade HVAC; redundant systems; humidification; vibration isolation from galleries

space_library.name: Electrical Room
notes: Emergency generator for climate control continuity; UPS for security systems

plan_archetypes.notes: Donut with central atrium for galleries; branching for sequential exhibit flow
